fields.title: Fall Tour Comes to Vidalia — Saturday November 7
fields.address: Vidalia Community Center, 404 Mulberry Street, Vidalia GA 30474
fields.accessible_route_wording: The full tour route is wheelchair-accessible. Please enter through the west door of the Community Center. Ramped access at every stop.
fields.rain_plan: In case of light rain the tour will proceed as scheduled. In case of heavy rain we will move to the indoor plant showcase in Room 3 of the Community Center, and the outdoor bed tour will resume when weather permits.
fields.sponsor_list_text: Thank you to the Vidalia Onion Committee (Presenting), Ameris Bank Vidalia Branch, First State Bank of Vidalia, Toombs County Farm Bureau, Vidalia Family Dentistry ($500 Gold Bed), Vidalia Heritage Farms, Wooten Nursery & Landscape, Piggly Wiggly of Vidalia, Park Seed Co, Belk of Vidalia, Peach State Heating & Air, State Farm Nathan Fussell Agency, Sasser Insurance Group, Grimsley Feed & Seed, Sal's BBQ, Magnolia Café, Vidalia Drug, and our media partner the Vidalia Advance.

_coherence_note: Vidalia Family Dentistry stated as $500 Gold Bed. Signed letter and Stripe say $750. This lags. C2. Rain plan is CURRENT (newer than Figma B9). Address correct. Start time correct. Ticket price correct (still current).
